headline: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Offers Strong Growth and a Promising Technical Breakout Setup
summary: Arista Networks (ANET) combines strong fundamental growth with a bullish technical setup, scoring 7/10 fundamentals and 9/10 technicals. The stock shows excellent EPS and revenue growth, zero debt, and is consolidating near support for a potential breakout.
